cache.description: Cache transformations to improve testing speed.

file.description: List of file paths to only test.

serial.description: Run tests in serial instead of parallel.

includeZeroCoverageAudit.description: Generate list of components with zero jest coverage from coverage-summary.json file if included.

getComponentsMissingA11yCoverage.description: Generates list of components without a11y coverage.

eventProjectName.description: Snake-cased project name that enables sending of a11y scores to Snowflake and allows grouping with other project-related metrics.

debugEvents.description: Enable verbose logging for debugging Snowflake-bound events. Requires a `projectName` to take effect.

sendEventsToProd.description: Send a11y scores to Snowflake production environment if `true`, otherwise send to development environment. Requires a `projectName` to take effect.

skipAccessibleTest.description: Skip running the toBeAccessible tests and assume all tests passed.
